title: Gardening Tweaks
description: A handful of flowery additions to Minecraft's gardening mechanics!
body:
![This project proudly suppports the LGBTQIA+ community](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OakLoaf/OakLoaf/refs/heads/main/assets/pride.png) ![Info](https://imgur.com/4fsdqsb.png)

![API](https://i.imgur.com/BdF7AGF.png) ![Version Number](https://repo.lushplugins.org/api/badge/latest/releases/org/lushplugins/GardeningTweaks?color=40c14a&name=Latest) **Javadocs:** https://oakloaf.github.io/GardeningTweaks/
Maven **Repository:** ```xml lushplugins https://repo.lushplugins.org/snapshots/ ``` **Artifact:** ```xml org.lushplugins GardeningTweaks 3.0.3 ```
Gradle **Repository:** ```gradle repositories { mavenCentral() maven("https://repo.lushplugins.org/snapshots/") } ``` **Artifact:** ```gradle dependencies { compileOnly "org.lushplugins:GardeningTweaks:3.0.3" } ```


![Have a nice day](https://imgur.com/A3r2tYH.png)
